title: Bulbophyllum vanroyenii
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum vanroyenii is classified under the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid belongs to the genus Bulbophyllum. It is further classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. The species is native to New Caledonia and is known for its unique characteristics. Within the orchid family, it falls under the tribe Dendrobieae.
